# Machiavelli

*1469 – 1527 · Italian*

Secretary of the Florentine republic and founder of modern political thought: he describes power as it is actually exercised, not as it ought to be, teaching the prince to use force and cunning when necessity demands, to found and preserve the state.

> Stub profile: only this mini-card exists so far; the sourced axis positions remain to be authored. Contributions welcome.
